safeToRun: Reads local launch contracts and generated readiness packets, then optionally writes docs/production-operator-brief files. It does not dispatch GitHub Actions, set or request secrets, deploy, mutate DNS, create Cloudflare resources, call paid APIs, upload files, download artifacts, or print secret values.

currentState.releaseEvidencePolicy: Stored snapshot evidence is generated before the artifact commit lands, so this commit can trail repository HEAD. Use npm run verify:production-state-current for exact current-commit release evidence.

secretBoundary.valueHandling: Enter externally issued secret values directly into GitHub or Cloudflare. Do not paste values into chat, docs, Git, screenshots, or logs.

operatorSequence.evidence: Confirms the current local build, launch contracts, source governance, GitHub release evidence, Cloudflare readiness probes, and no-secret packets before production action.

commands: gh secret set CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN --env production --repo marcgough/herbalist
gh secret set CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID --env production --repo marcgough/herbalist
operatorSequence.evidence: After entry, run npm run verify:github-production-readiness -- --strict.

commands: gh workflow run production-deploy.yml --repo marcgough/herbalist --ref main -f confirm=deploy-herbalisti-production -f skip_live_verification=false

gh workflow run production-deploy.yml --repo marcgough/herbalist --ref main -f confirm=deploy-herbalisti-production -f skip_live_verification=true -f skip_live_verification_confirm=skip-herbalisti-live-verification
operatorSequence.evidence: Use final completion mode only when live verification is expected to pass. DNS transition mode cannot prove completion.
Connect herbalisti.com to the Herbalisti Cloudflare Pages project and re-run DNS/live readiness checks after propagation.
A fresh protected feed refresh and strict live verification are required before the overall Herbalisti goal can be complete.

hardGates.description: Entering or generating production secret values.
Dispatching the guarded GitHub production workflow or manually deploying Cloudflare Pages/Worker.
Changing herbalisti.com nameservers, DNS records, or Cloudflare Pages custom-domain configuration.
Calling Kie.ai Seedance or any paid generation provider.

checks.detail: Only Cloudflare deployment credentials are required as GitHub production environment secrets.
Protected feed and media admin tokens are generated runtime names, not required external GitHub credentials.
Cloudflare API token permissions are documented without token values.
GitHub dispatch packet preserves strict final verification and DNS-transition acknowledgement.
Final completion gates are strict live-domain checks.
Package exposes generated operator brief commands.
Full release verification includes the operator brief.
All source packets used by the operator brief exist.

nextAction: Set the required GitHub production environment secret names directly in GitHub, then run npm run verify:github-production-readiness -- --strict.
